name: x402-aggregator
description: x402 Aggregator providing paid BM25 search across the CDP x402 catalog. Experimental component in the Genesis Conductor public ecosystem for agentic discovery, paid tool access, and MCP-integrated retrieval patterns by @invariantx.

plugins.name: x402-aggregator
plugins.description: Paid BM25 search aggregator over CDP x402 catalog. Supports agentic paid tool usage and retrieval in Genesis Conductor workflows. Complements OpenClaw skills (mcp-openclaw-bridge for publishing such capabilities as skills) and ties into the main @invariantx openclaw-skills marketplace for production orchestration.
